_comment: Two kinds of content: (1) generic structural PDF labels that are identical across all measurands and labs — these never change unless the PDF layout changes; (2) runtime-computed placeholders (0.0 / 0) overwritten by analisi_calib_data.py at every pipeline run.

observations_base: Results refer exclusively to the instrument identified in this certificate.
Calibration is valid under the declared conditions and on the execution date.

statements_base: The reported results are valid only under the calibration conditions stated in this certificate.
Partial or full reproduction is permitted only with written authorization from the laboratory.
pdf_template_data_base.procedure_text_template:
Procedure N. {procedure_code}
Traceability starts from first-line standards N. {chain_ids}
with valid calibration certificates N. {cert_ids} issued by {cert_labs} with A.
